task.instruction: Go past the first streetlamp, then turn until you see the black car, then go to the black car, then turn toward the red car and go to the red car. Finally, land in front of the traffic light pole on the right.

llm_subgoals: Turn until you see the black car
Land in front of the traffic light pole on the right

override_history.reasoning: convergence (stopped_short): The first streetlamp is still clearly visible ahead near the center of the latest frames, so the drone has approached it but not yet gone past it. Progress has slowed after nearly 8 meters of forward travel, and a small additional forward move is the main missing action.

Stop requested for correction. Reasoning: The first streetlamp now fills much of the frame directly ahead, so the drone is extremely close but has still not clearly moved past it and is on a likely collision course if it continues. convergence (stopped_short): The latest frames show the first streetlamp/traffic-signal pole filling the foreground directly ahead, with the drone extremely close but still not clearly beyond it. A previous forward correction did not improve completion, so the biggest bottleneck is obstacle clearance; ascending is the safest single action to avoid colliding while setting up to pass the lamp.

Reasoning: The streetlamp now fills much of the frame directly ahead, so the drone is extremely close but still has not moved past it and is on a near-collision course with the pole. convergence (stopped_short): The streetlamp is still directly ahead and fills much of the latest frames, so the drone has not yet gone past it; it is extremely close and on a collision course. A small right turn is the safest single-axis correction to sidestep the pole after the previous ascend failed to improve completion.

Stop requested for correction. Reasoning: The streetlamp is now extremely close and directly beside the drone, so it has stopped short at the landmark rather than clearly moving past it. Raw: {"complete":false,"completion_percentage":0.99,"should_stop":true,"reasoning":"The streetlamp is now extremely close and directly beside the drone, so it has stopped short at the landmark rather than clearly moving past it."}

convergence (stopped_short): The streetlamp fills the frame and is directly beside the drone, but the latest views still show the pole adjacent rather than clearly behind, so the drone appears to have stopped at the landmark instead of passing it. The previous corrections changed altitude and yaw without improving completion, so the remaining bottleneck is a small forward move to get definitively past the streetlamp.

Checkpoint thinks complete, verifying at convergence. Reasoning: The streetlamp moves from centered ahead to the extreme left edge and then mostly out of frame, which is strong evidence the drone has just passed it. Raw: {"complete":true,"completion_percentage":1.0,"should_stop":false,"reasoning":"The streetlamp moves from centered ahead to the extreme left edge and then mostly out of frame, which is strong evidence the drone has just passed it."}
